text.title: Google Ads Account Foundations Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: verify-conversion-tracking
step.decision-gate: If not, STOP and complete ads-conversion-tracking first.

step.name: pick-campaign-types
step.action: Map intent → Search / Shopping / PMax / Display.

step.name: scaffold-ad-groups
step.action: Group into 1 theme = 10-20 keywords; reject SKAGs.

step.name: billing-and-roles
step.action: Verify payment method; scope admin / manager / read-only.
